title: Implement glob bracket expressions [abc]
description: Extend existing matchGlob/expandGlob to support bracket expressions like [abc], [a-z], [0-9]. Currently glob supports * and ? but not character class patterns. Vision gap: 'Glob expansion only covers single-directory patterns — no bracket expressions'. Acceptance: ls [abc]* matches files starting with a/b/c, grep 'test[0-9]' finds test1/test2 patterns, negated brackets [\!abc] also work.
